description_long: This is a plush, pink stuffed toy resembling a small, cartoonish animal with a rounded body and four stubby legs. Its head is large and features two prominent, triangular ears with dark inner linings and a light gray patch running from the forehead to the back. The toy has big, expressive eyes with black pupils that give it a curious and playful appearance. The nose is subtle, and there are no visible mouth or whiskers. The surface appears soft and slightly matte, typical of fabric plush toys, and the overall shape is chubby and inviting. The toy is likely filled with a lightweight, compressible material, making it squeezable and huggable.
description: A pink, plush stuffed toy with large eyes, triangular ears, and a rounded, chubby body. It has a soft, fabric surface and a playful, cartoonish appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the toy's large eyes, triangular ears, and the central light gray patch on its forehead.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the protruding ears, the rounded body, and the way the eyes are set into the face.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, the light gray patch extending down the back, and the stubby legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the ear and eye placement, as well as the toy's overall roundness.
attribute_character_or_animal_represente: cartoon pink animal with large ears
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is playful and curious, with wide, open eyes looking slightly to the side. There is no visible mouth, giving it a neutral but endearing look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright on all four short legs with the head slightly raised and ears perked up.
